caption: SEAF Games, Singapore — our synchro and diving squads brought home three medals against international competition.
Master Competition — TT66 swimmers combined for eight podium finishes across relay and individual events.
Weekly squad training at Kolam Renang Senayan, GBK — six decades of technique-first coaching in the water.
Hong Kong Open Age Group — three more medals abroad, proof our age-group swimmers compete at any distance.
